summary: Adjusted the empty-name behavior so the frontend no longer generates a fallback profile name. `CreateProfileModal.js` now sends an empty `name` when the field is blank, and `ProfileService.CreateProfileAsync` now normalizes that on the backend via `EnsureProfileName`, generating a timestamp-plus-number profile name server-side before persistence and config hydration. I then re-ran diagnostics on the edited UI and service files and confirmed they remain lint-clean.
current_status: Profile creation now delegates random fallback naming to the backend as requested, while the earlier Create Profile sync, proxy persistence, Start URL, and fingerprint state changes remain intact.
